overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk video game showing a character walking through a neon-lit dystopian city. The character travels along elevated walkways and under highway overpasses, passing pedestrians, vendors, and moderate vehicle traffic in a futuristic urban environment with towering skyscrapers and dense overhead infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with city skyline view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated walkway toward the distant illuminated skyscraper

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in bright orange pants walking ahead on the walkway
futuristic sedan driving along the multi-lane road

entered.detail: massive concrete elevated highway structure spanning across the road ahead
large illuminated digital signs with Asian characters and advertisements
towering crystalline building with internal lighting visible through glass facade
wooden utility poles with multiple overhead electrical wires crossing the scene
metal guard rail separating the pedestrian walkway from the road below

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an open elevated pedestrian walkway with a clear view of the futuristic city skyline. Neon billboards and a massive glass skyscraper dominate the view ahead, while vehicles pass on the right and other pedestrians share the walkway.

events.description: enters the covered area beneath the highway overpass with reduced sky visibility
crosses the multi-lane street at a yellow striped crosswalk while vehicles wait

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass and crossing the street at the crosswalk with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: character in green hoodie and mask walking alongside the ego
blue sports car stopped at the intersection waiting for pedestrians

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying the text CANT BREATHE in white letters
yellow zebra-striped pedestrian crossing markings on the road surface
suspended traffic signal showing green light

segments.scene_description: The character enters the shadow of the highway overpass, transitioning from open sky to a semi-covered environment. The walkway leads to a crosswalk where the character crosses the street alongside other pedestrians, passing under the massive concrete highway deck while a blue car waits at the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian corridor under highway with street vendors

events.description: ambient lighting shifts to darker artificial illumination dominated by neon signs

agents.ego_description: continuing through the covered walkway passing vendors and pedestrians sitting on benches

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a concrete bench next to a vendor stall
pedestrian in white tank top with red text walking ahead

entered.detail: solid concrete ceiling formed by the underside of the highway above
small street vendor booths with neon lighting and merchandise displays
dark building facade with windows and external air conditioning units

segments.scene_description: Now fully under the highway overpass, the character walks through a darker corridor illuminated by artificial neon lights. Vendor stalls line the left side of the walkway, with people sitting on benches nearby, while the concrete ceiling of the highway looms overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: underpass corridor transitioning toward open street

events.description: approaching brighter area at the end of the underpass with increasing natural light visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the final section of the covered walkway toward the illuminated exit

notable_agents.action: large truck driving along the road visible through the side openings

entered.detail: directional signs and billboards mounted to the highway structure above

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the underpass walkway, which gradually becomes brighter as it approaches an exit. The ceiling transitions from solid concrete to a more open structure with gaps, allowing more light to filter through while vehicles pass on the right side of the safety rail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from an open, neon-lit skyline view into the oppressive shadow of a massive urban overpass. It begins on an elevated pedestrian walkway, moving forward past other citizens toward a horizon dominated by towering glass skyscrapers and glowing billboards. As the character advances, the open sky gradually disappears as the path leads beneath the heavy concrete deck of a highway. The scene then shifts from the airy heights of the walkway to a street-level crosswalk, where the camera follows the character across the intersection alongside other pedestrians while a blue car waits nearby.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dim urban underpass that gradually opens into a brighter, more exposed walkway. It begins in a dark corridor beneath a heavy concrete highway overpass, where artificial neon lights illuminate vendor stalls and pedestrians resting on benches. As the character advances, the oppressive ceiling begins to shift, transitioning from solid concrete to an open structure with gaps that allow more light to filter through. The scene then expands as the walkway approaches an exit, with the environment brightening while vehicles pass steadily along the right side of the safety rail.
